---
title: "Future Hopf Horizon"
---

This page tracks the octonionic Hopf horizon. It is active because the project has finite and bounded coordinate seeds here, but it remains horizon-facing because the full theory is not complete.

::: {.warning-box}
This page should remain scoped as future work wherever the theorem manifest says future, deferred, or roadmap. The checked cards below do not imply a completed octonionic Hopf fibration theory.
:::

## What To Notice

- `S15-T0003` records a bounded coordinate landing fact.
- `S15-T0005` through `S15-T0007` record safe right-phase facts under explicit hypotheses.
- `S15-T0008` is a guardrail counterexample against a naive full-coordinate invariance claim.
- `S15-T0009` records the finite eight-suspension Euler-parity fact.

::: {.checkpoint-box}

## Checkpoint

How does a counterexample theorem help the Living Book stay honest about the S15 horizon?

:::

## Source Trail

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S15-T0003"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S15-T0005"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S15-T0006"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S15-T0007"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S15-T0008"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="S15-T0009"></div>

<p data-paper-ref="papers/future/S15/PAPER_S15_01_OCTONIONIC_HOPF_ROADMAP.md">Paper source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/future/S15/PAPER_S15_01_OCTONIONIC_HOPF_ROADMAP.md">S15 Octonionic Hopf Roadmap</a></p>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
